productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Brown Leather Shoe
description: Look stylish and on trend with these brown leather shoes from red tape. These shoes are designed for comfort and will look great when teamed with chinos and shirts for a cool casual look.Upper High quality leather upper with matt look for protection, comfort and durability Stitch detailing and raw edge detailing for extra style Lace-ups for snug Fit Textile lined collar and tongue for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with circular lug pattern for better grip shoe careUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shiny
